question: What is true about the concept of peer-to-peer networks? [1]
options: Peer-to-peer applications allow their users to control how many node connections should be searched for or allowed at the same time.
A peer-to-peer network is a centralized communication model that can establish communication to all other nodes.
The computers of some users are both providers and consumers of resources.
answer: Peer-to-peer applications allow their users to control how many node connections should be searched for or allowed at the same time.
